svg.metadata:
{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"flowchart LR
 A[instantiateService]
 B[initializeAsync]
 C[addEntity / addEntities]
 D[connect]
 E[seedEntity]
 F[use RestClient normally]
 G[disconnect]
 H[sync dirty records]

 A --> B
 B --> C
 C --> D
 D --> E
 E --> F
 F -.->|going back online| G
 G --> H
 H -.->|reconnect| D

 style F fill:#fff3e0
 style H fill:#e1f5fe
","style":"notebook"}

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
